word: G5143 - τρέχω - tréchō - trekh'-o - Have course

sections.paragraph:
τρέχω - trechō - trekh'-o

Apparently a primary verb (properly θρέχω threchō; compare G2359); which uses δρέμω dremō, drem'-o (the base of G1408) as an alternate in certain tenses; to run or walk hastily (literally or figuratively): - have course, run.
